---
title: "Glossary"
subtitle: "Every term, pinned where it was first defined."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

**data set**\
A data set is a collection of observations.

```{=html}
<!--
Convention for entries:

## Term
One- or two-sentence working definition, in the same plain register as
the posts. First appeared in [Q1](posts/q001/index.qmd).
-->
```
